name: codex-usage-dock
description: Install, launch, and troubleshoot the Codex Usage Dock companion app.

interface.shortDescription: Keep five-hour and weekly Codex usage visible.
interface.longDescription: Launch and troubleshoot the cross-platform Codex Usage Dock companion, a private local panel that follows the Codex window and shows five-hour and seven-day usage.
defaultPrompt: Help me install Codex Usage Dock.
Diagnose why my usage dock is not visible.
